Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import polars as pl
df = pl.scan_parquet\('data/l1/year=*/data.parquet'\)
stats = df.select\([
    pl.col\('timestamp'\).min\(\).alias\('min_ts'\),
    pl.col\('timestamp'\).max\(\).alias\('max_ts'\),
    pl.len\(\).alias\('rows'\),
]\).collect\(\)
print\(f'Rows: {stats[\\"rows\\"][0]:,}'\)
print\(f'From: {stats[\\"min_ts\\"][0]}'\)
print\(f'To:   {stats[\\"max_ts\\"][0]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import numpy as np
import lightgbm as lgb
X = np.array\([[1,2],[3,4]], dtype=np.float32\)
y = np.array\([0,1]\)
ds = lgb.Dataset\(X, label=y\)
try:
    b = lgb.train\({'device': 'gpu', 'objective': 'binary', 'verbose': -1}, ds, num_boost_round=1\)
    print\('GPU: YES'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'GPU: NO \({e}\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -u -c "
import polars as pl
l1 = pl.read_parquet\('data/l1/year=2026/data.parquet'\)
print\('L1 2026 rows:', len\(l1\)\)
print\('L1 columns:', l1.columns\)
print\('L1 last timestamp:', l1['timestamp'].max\(\)\)
print\(\)
ohlcv = pl.read_parquet\('data/parquet/year=2026/data.parquet'\)
print\('OHLCV 2026 rows:', len\(ohlcv\)\)
print\('OHLCV columns:', ohlcv.columns\)
ts_col = [c for c in ohlcv.columns if 'time' in c.lower\(\) or 'ts' in c.lower\(\) or 'date' in c.lower\(\)]
if ts_col:
    print\('OHLCV last timestamp:', ohlcv[ts_col[0]].max\(\)\)
else:
    print\(ohlcv.tail\(3\)\)
")

import polars as pl
from pathlib import Path
for p in sorted\(Path\('data/l1'\).glob\('year=*/data.parquet'\)\):
